title: 1.12.2's repaint
body:
# 介绍
这个资源包是Take On a new look的1.12.2特别支持版。
建议与modernity以及[modernity extra](https://github.com/RuiXuqi/ModernityExtra)一起使用。

至于为啥叫“1.12.2重绘”，额......咱起名困难。（其实原来叫文艺复兴，但因为名字被别人占用了，悲）
# 描述
这个资源包修改了许多mod的纹理。
包括：
1. 冒险漩涡
2. into the end
3. eye of dragons
4. mowziesmobs
5. 突变生物重制版
6. 丛林传说
7. 伤害显示
# 关于......
- 贴图不可以用于其他地方。
- 此资源包可以用于整合包中，但不可以修改zip文件的内容，包括.packmeta文件的描述。
- 我的画风并不是jappa风格，看起来可能会稍显突兀，见谅。
- 我已经没有信心继续这个项目了，抱歉。
# Description
This resource pack is a special support version of Take On a new look 1.12.2.
Recommended with Modernity as well as [Modernity Extra](https://github.com/RuiXuqi/ModernityExtra) together.
This resource pack mod's textures of many mods.
Include:
1. into the Maelstrom
2. into the end
3. eye of dragons
4. mowziesmobs
5. mutant beasts
6. welcome to the jungle
7. torohelth
# About what
- textures can't be used elsewhere.
- This resource pack can be used in the integration package, but it cannot modify the contents of the zip file, including the description of the .packmeta file.
- My art style is not jappa style, and it may look a little obtrusive, forgive me.
- I'm no longer confident enough to support this project。
